The key area for Asel to focus on is inference – drawing conclusions about characters' feelings and motives from evidence in the text. This is an important skill that will unlock deeper comprehension for her. Building her reading vocabulary through wider reading will also support her understanding. Reading regularly from quality texts and actively discussing what she reads will be central to her continued progress in Year 5.

The key areas for Asel to develop are her composition skills – particularly in generating and organising her ideas – and her use of grammar and punctuation to support meaning. Building her vocabulary choices will also help her express her ideas more precisely. Reading widely will support all these areas, giving her examples of how writers craft their work, which she can then apply in her own writing in Year 5.
